ogTitle: Beelbee vs Beenaam Valley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Beelbee and Beenaam Valley.
heading: Beelbee vs Beenaam Valley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Beelbee, Queensland and Beenaam Valley, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Beelbee has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Beenaam Valley (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Beelbee or Beenaam Valley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Beelbee has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Beenaam Valley scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Beelbee scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Beenaam Valley scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Beelbee or Beenaam Valley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Beelbee has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
